flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Caribbean University-Bayamon rose 61% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $8.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Caribbean University-Bayamon rose 61% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.5k → $8.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 60% at Caribbean University-Bayamon vs the 2003–2007 baseline (623 vs 1.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Caribbean University-Bayamon fell 11% between 2006 and 2009 (1.9k → 1.7k).
